response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of strong individual-contributor software engineering experience with relevant adjacencies (test frameworks Trial and Fluent-Asserts, CI/CD setup, developer workshops, MCP tooling), but the resume shows no explicit people-management track record, which is a core requirement of this Level II Manager role. Mobile-platform exposure is limited to a brief iOS/Apple TV stint nearly a decade ago. Worth a screening conversation to probe leadership scope at Altom/Founder roles, but on paper this reads as a strong senior IC rather than an engineering manager.
strengths: Long, diverse engineering background with hands-on dev-tools work (Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts, CI/Docker infra, MCP code generators)
Demonstrated mentorship and knowledge-sharing through workshops, courses, and Refactoring Dojos
Founder of GISCollective and Staff-level roles suggest technical leadership and ownership
concerns: No explicit people-management or direct-report experience stated on the resume
Mobile-platform experience is thin and dated (brief iOS/Apple TV work in 2015–2016)
Developer-tools and build/test-infra experience is scattered across side projects rather than a focused 3+ year role
